titleStmt.title: SII 19.383: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 383. (A.R. No. 492 of 1925.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This records an endowment of 507(1/2) kaḻañju of gold deposited with the chaturvēdibhaṭṭat-tānapperumakkaḷ of Śembiyanmahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Kaṇṇapparaśiyār alias Sonna (Svarṇa) Mahādēviyār (a queen of Uttama-Chōḷa ?), to provide with the interest thereon for special offering to the god and its distribution, on the day of Kēṭṭai (Jyēshṭha) asterism in Chittirai month, which was the natalstar of the queenmother Sembiyaṉ-Mahādēviyār the founder of the temple and of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .. kopparakesarivarmmakku yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu [ kaṇṭaṉ maturān=taka] devarāṉa śrīuttamacoḻadevaraiyt tiruvayiṟuvāytta Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyār śrī parāntakaṉ
mātevaṭikaḷārāṉa śrīcempiyaṉmahādeviyār ceytaruḷiṉa teṉkarai Aḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīcempiyaṉmahādeviccaturvetimaṅkalattu caturvedi[ bhaṭṭat tāṉap]
perumakkaḷukku Ivvūr śrī kayilāsamuṭaiya mahādevar koyililey Ippirāṭṭiyār tiruṉāḷāṉa cittirait tirukkeṭṭaiya nāḷ meykkāṭṭi Uṇpatāka kaṇ
ṇapparaciyārāṉa coṉṉamahādeviyār Ivvūr (ūr)ūrkkallāl kuṭutta poṉ 5 100 7� Ippoṉ Ainnūṟṟu Eḻukaḻañcaraiyum Iddharmam cantrātityavaṟ
niṟkumvaṇṇam Ippoṉ mutalaḻiyāmey Itaṉāl vanta bhogam Uṇṇappeṟuvārkaḷāka vaiyttatu .
Digital edition of SII 19.383 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
